info.description: REST API for REW (Room EQ Wizard) software for room acoustic measurement, loudspeaker measurement and audio device measurement
info.title: REW REST API

tags.name: input-levels
tags.description: API to monitor levels on the inputs

tags.name: generator
tags.description: Signal generator endpoints exposing all signals and controls

tags.name: spl-meter
tags.description: API to configure and monitor SPL meters

tags.name: spl-logger
tags.description: API to control the SPL logger

tags.name: measure
tags.description: Measure API exposing ways to measure

tags.name: stepped-measurement
tags.description: API to configure and run stepped measurements

tags.name: eq
tags.description: EQ API exposing EQ defaults and settings

tags.name: alignment-tool
tags.description: API to use the alignment tool

tags.name: groups
tags.description: Groups API exposing all measurement groups

get.description: Get the list of commands

Get any errors that have occurred
Get the error subscribers
Get the last warning that occurred
Get any warnings that have been issued
Get the warning subscribers
Get the blocking enable. If true the API will not respond to posted actions until the action completes. If false long-running tasks will respond with Accepted rather than OK.

post.description: Set the blocking enable. If true the API will not respond to posted actions until the action completes. If false long-running tasks will respond with Accepted rather than OK.

get.description: Get the logging enable. If true the API will log API messages to rew_output.txt in the REW log files folder

post.description: Set the logging enable. If true the API will log API messages to rew_output.txt in the REW log files folder

get.description: Get the inhibit graph updates flag. If true REW will not update any of its graphs, this may be useful when running actions which delete or modify measurements to prevent graphs being updated with partial data or errors caused by trying to plot data which is no longer available.

post.description: Set the inhibit graph updates flag. If true REW will not update any of its graphs, this may be useful when running actions which delete or modify measurements to prevent graphs being updated with partial data or errors caused by trying to plot data which is no longer available.

get.description: Gets the frequency response of the target for the measurement at index id or with UUID id, index starts from 1

parameters.name: unit
parameters.description: Specify the magnitude data unit  e.g. ?unit=dBFS, default is SPL

parameters.name: ppo
parameters.description: Specify the points per octave to get log-spaced data  e.g. ?ppo=48, default is 96 PPO

get.description: Gets the frequency response for the measurement at index id or with UUID id, index starts from 1

parameters.name: unit
parameters.description: Specify the magnitude data unit  e.g. ?unit=dBFS, default is SPL

parameters.name: smoothing
parameters.description: Specify the smoothing  e.g. ?smoothing="1/12", default is the measurement's current smoothing

parameters.name: ppo
parameters.description: Specify the points per octave to get log-spaced data  e.g. ?ppo=48, default is the measurement's current spacing

get.description: Gets the predicted frequency response for the equalised measurement at index id or with UUID id, index starts from 1

parameters.name: unit
parameters.description: Specify the magnitude data unit  e.g. ?unit=dBFS, default is SPL

parameters.name: smoothing
parameters.description: Specify the smoothing  e.g. ?smoothing="1/12", default is the measurement's current smoothing

parameters.name: ppo
parameters.description: Specify the points per octave to get log-spaced data  e.g. ?ppo=48, default is the measurement's current spacing

get.description: Gets the group delay for the measurement at index id or with UUID id, index starts from 1

parameters.name: smoothing
parameters.description: Specify the smoothing  e.g. ?smoothing="1/12", default is the measurement's current smoothing

parameters.name: ppo
parameters.description: Specify the points per octave to get log-spaced data  e.g. ?ppo=48, default is the measurement's current spacing

get.description: Gets the predicted group delay for the equalised measurement at index id or with UUID id, index starts from 1

parameters.name: smoothing
parameters.description: Specify the smoothing  e.g. ?smoothing="1/12", default is the measurement's current smoothing

parameters.name: ppo
parameters.description: Specify the points per octave to get log-spaced data  e.g. ?ppo=48, default is the measurement's current spacing

get.description: Gets the impulse response for the measurement at index id or with UUID id, index starts from 1

parameters.name: unit
parameters.description: Specify the impulse data unit  e.g. ?unit=dBFS, default is percent

parameters.name: windowed
parameters.description: For windowed data include ?windowed=true, default is false

parameters.name: normalised
parameters.description: For data that is not normalised include ?normalised=false, default is true

parameters.name: samplerate
parameters.description: Sample rate in Hz can be specified e.g. ?samplerate=48000, default is the rate of the data being exported

get.description: Gets the predicted impulse response for the equalised measurement at index id or with UUID id, index starts from 1

parameters.name: unit
parameters.description: Specify the impulse data unit  e.g. ?unit=dBFS, default is percent

parameters.name: windowed
parameters.description: For windowed data include ?windowed=true, default is false

parameters.name: normalised
parameters.description: For data that is not normalised include ?normalised=false, default is true

parameters.name: samplerate
parameters.description: Sample rate in Hz can be specified e.g. ?samplerate=48000, default is the rate of the data being exported

get.description: Gets the filters impulse response for the measurement at index id or with UUID id, index starts from 1

parameters.name: samplerate
parameters.description: Use samplerate to set the sample rate in Hz, e.g. ?samplerate=48000

parameters.name: length
parameters.description: Use length to set the number of samples in the impulse response, e.g. ?length=65536

post.description: Send an EQ command for the measurement at index id or with UUID id, index starts from 1

get.description: Gets the filter settings used to generate RT60 data

Get a map of RT60 and other ISO3382 data vs frequency for the specified octave fraction for the measurement at index id or with UUID id, index starts from 1. Unfiltered result is mapped to zero frequency.

parameters.name: octaveFrac
parameters.description: Specify the octave fraction, default is 1

get.description: Gets the distortion data for the measurement at index id or with UUID id, index starts from 1

parameters.name: unit
parameters.description: Specify the data unit  e.g. ?unit=dBr, default is percent

parameters.name: ppo
parameters.description: Specify the points per octave for distortion vs frequency  e.g. ?ppo=24, default is 3
